title: Manufacturing Engineer - Royal Enfield - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Royal Enfield - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Royal Enfield is actively seeking a talented and motivated Manufacturing Engineer to join our dynamic team in Jaipur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Royal Enfield:
Royal Enfield is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Quality Control

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Royal Enfield!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
